rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly walks through the logical consistency of the argument chain, identifying multiple issues and proposing specific fixes. It flags the robustness claim as unsupported by the stated theorem, critiques the empirical performance assertion, and addresses other logical gaps.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks uncertainty for several claims, such as the attribution to Fang et al. (2018) and the existence of adaptive SPIDER/SARAH variants. It suggests verifying these points before submission.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stays within the scope of the critique, addressing all aspects of the introduction without drifting into unrelated topics. It provides detailed feedback on each section of the introduction.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could be misleading if not addressed. It suggests specific improvements to avoid overreach and misrepresentation.
rationale.RX.5: The agent traces its critiques back to specific parts of the original text, providing clear annotations for each recommendation. It explains the reasoning behind each critique and suggestion.
